title: Number 10 Balloons - Purple, 40 Inch Large Digital Helium Foil Mylar Birthday Balloons with 6Pcs Purple Confetti for 10th Boys/Girls Birthday/Anniversary Party Decorations
features: Purple Number 10 Balloons Set: You will get 2pcs 40 inch mylar foil number balloons (number 1 + number 0), 6pcs purple confetti latex balloons and 1pc balloon ribbon. These balloons are for adding a touch of elegance and sophistication to any celebration

Digital 10 Balloons: Your 10th birthday party decorations will be much more decent and vivid by hanging the 10 number balloons. Very nice gloss with bright color and big size for 10th birthday party decors. You will be very satisfied

Durable Quality: The durable quality self-inflating 10th number decorations balloons will Hardly leaking and long last for the whole birthday party even several weeks. It is the choice for your birthday party balloon decoration

Easy to Use: It supports helium or air, after filling, the valve of the aluminum foil balloon is automatically closed, it is recommended to pinch the self-sealing valve to prevent air leakage. these number balloons have holes at the top and can be stringed or hung with ribbon; Also be attached to walls, windows or doors

Wide Application: Purple number balloons are a fun and versatile decorative item that can add a touch of color and festivity to any event. They are commonly used for birthday parties, graduations, anniversaries, or any event where you want to celebrate a specific age or milestone where the number being celebrated is an important part of the festivities
